gdp-real.desc: The economy of the Slovak Republic grew by 0.8% in 2025, easing from a downwardly revised 1.9% rise in 2024 and marking the weakest expansion since 2022. trade-balance.desc: Slovakia posted a trade surplus of EUR 591.5 million in March 2026, widening from EUR 386.5 million in the same month last year.
